title: Material Design
description: Google's reference guide for designing applications for Material as well as how they approach design systems

title: Httpster
description: A website I reference often when I am looking to see what cool new websites are out there for inspiration

title: Awwwards
description: A website showcasing what's trending and creative in the web design world

title: Human Interface Guidelines
description: One of the foundational references for product designers in my opinion, contains Apple's guide to design

title: Mobbin
description: A tool for referencing and making collections of current design patterns from the most successful products

title: Wallpaper
description: Write-ups and blog posts about design, interiors, architecture, fashion, and art

title: A List Apart
description: One of the leading blogs for learning about detailed topics relevant to tech practices and skillsets

title: Typewolf
description: A typography reference, showcasing what is trending in type and how to use type correctly

title: Staff Design
description: Interviews with high-level IC designers, getting their perspective on craft and career paths

title: The Field Guide to Human-Centered Design
description: Covers the design process of IDEO, including their philosophy with a ton of real-world examples

title: Universal Principles of Design
description: Explains 125 foundational concepts of design that come together to make great design happen

title: Leadership and Self-Deception
description: Covers a key to leadership of bringing your full self to work and genuinely caring about others

title: Powerful
description: Netflix's Chief Talent Officer and her approach to building a culture of freedom and responsibility

title: Articulating Design Decisions
description: Helps designers communicate with stakeholders while balancing business and design priorities

title: The User Experience Team of One
description: Provides tactics to help teams do more research with less. Great for smaller teams and first designers.

title: The Making of a Manager
description: An incredible introduction to the world of management and how to approach the hard parts

title: The Lean Startup
description: Great resource for learning methods for operating as a small startup and using resources wisely

title: Show Your Work
description: When others ask about how prolific I am, I send this book. Shows how to share work, no matter your level.

title: Steal Like an Artist
description: Eye-opening book around how creative work is all recycled in one way or another

title: Essentialism
description: A book about getting the right things done, rather than focused on getting things done quicker

title: Nonviolent Communication
description: A book that helped me learn how to have difficult conversations and coming to healthy solutions

title: Design Details
description: My favorite design podcast, it's since ended but still useful and helped me a lot in my early career

title: Waveform
description: A tech podcast for the gadget lovers and tech heads among us from the mind of Marques Brownlee

title: Ologies
description: Science podcast with harrowing, bizarre stories about what fuels professional -ologists' obsessions

title: Layout
description: A weekly podcast about design, technology, programming and everything else
